title: [InstCombine] Don't change fn signature for calls to declarations

tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "e-p:32:32"
target triple = "i686-pc-linux-gnu"

declare i32 @main2()

define ptr @ctime(ptr %0) {
tests.source_program:
target datalayout = "e-p:32:32"
target triple = "i686-pc-linux-gnu"

declare i32 @main2()

define ptr @ctime(ptr %0) {
entry:
  %i0 = call ptr @main2()
  ret ptr %i0
}

tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "e-p:32:32"
target triple = "i686-pc-linux-gnu"

define ptr @ctime2(ptr %p) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @ctime2(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret ptr [[P:%.*]]
  ret ptr %p
}

target datalayout = "e-p:32:32"
target triple = "i686-pc-linux-gnu"

define i32 @main2() {
; CHECK-LABEL: @main2(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 0
  ret i32 0
}

target datalayout = "e-p:32:32"
target triple = "i686-pc-linux-gnu"

declare void @bundles_callee(i32)

define void @bundles() {
; CHECK-LABEL: define void @bundles() {
; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @bundles_callee(i32 0) [ "deopt"() ]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
entry:
  call void @bundles_callee() [ "deopt"() ]
  ret void
}
tests.source_program:
target datalayout = "e-p:32:32"
target triple = "i686-pc-linux-gnu"

declare void @bundles_callee(i32)

define void @bundles() {
entry:
  call void @bundles_callee() [ "deopt"() ]
  ret void
}

tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "e-p:32:32"
target triple = "i686-pc-linux-gnu"

declare i32 @fn1(i32)

define i32 @test1(ptr %a) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define i32 @test1(
; CHECK-SAME: ptr [[A:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = ptrtoint ptr [[A]] to i32
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CALL:%.*]] = tail call i32 @fn1(i32 [[TMP0]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[CALL]]
entry:
  %call = tail call i32 @fn1(ptr %a)
  ret i32 %call
}
tests.source_program:
target datalayout = "e-p:32:32"
target triple = "i686-pc-linux-gnu"

declare i32 @fn1(i32)

define i32 @test1(ptr %a) {
entry:
  %call = tail call i32 @fn1(ptr %a)
  ret i32 %call
}

tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "e-p:32:32"
target triple = "i686-pc-linux-gnu"

declare i1 @fn5(ptr byval({ i32, i32 }) align 4)

define i1 @test5() {
; CHECK-LABEL: define i1 @test5() {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = alloca { i32, i32 }, align 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP2:%.*]] = load i32, ptr [[TMP1]], align 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP3:%.*]] = getelementptr inbounds i8, ptr [[TMP1]], i32 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP4:%.*]] = load i32, ptr [[TMP3]], align 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP5:%.*]] = call i1 @fn5(i32 [[TMP2]], i32 [[TMP4]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[TMP5]]
  %1 = alloca { i32, i32 }, align 4
  %2 = getelementptr inbounds { i32, i32 }, ptr %1, i32 0, i32 0
  %3 = load i32, ptr %2, align 4
  %4 = getelementptr inbounds { i32, i32 }, ptr %1, i32 0, i32 1
  %5 = load i32, ptr %4, align 4
  %6 = call i1 @fn5(i32 %3, i32 %5)
  ret i1 %6
}
tests.source_program:
target datalayout = "e-p:32:32"
target triple = "i686-pc-linux-gnu"

declare i1 @fn5(ptr byval({ i32, i32 }) align 4)

define i1 @test5() {
  %1 = alloca { i32, i32 }, align 4
  %2 = getelementptr inbounds { i32, i32 }, ptr %1, i32 0, i32 0
  %3 = load i32, ptr %2, align 4
  %4 = getelementptr inbounds { i32, i32 }, ptr %1, i32 0, i32 1
  %5 = load i32, ptr %4, align 4
  %6 = call i1 @fn5(i32 %3, i32 %5)
  ret i1 %6
}

tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "E-p:64:64:64-p1:16:16:16-a0:0:8-f32:32:32-f64:64:64-i1:8:8-i8:8:8-i16:16:16-i32:32:32-i64:32:64-v64:64:64-v128:128:128"

declare void @test8a()

define ptr @test8() personality ptr @__gxx_personality_v0 {
; CHECK-LABEL: define ptr @test8() personality ptr @__gxx_personality_v0 {
; CHECK-NEXT:    invoke void @test8a()
; CHECK-NEXT:            to label [[INVOKE_CONT:%.*]] unwind label [[TRY_HANDLER:%.*]]
; CHECK:       invoke.cont:
; CHECK-NEXT:    unreachable
; CHECK:       try.handler:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[EXN:%.*]] = landingpad { ptr, i32 }
; CHECK-NEXT:            cleanup
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret ptr null
  invoke void @test8a()
          to label %invoke.cont unwind label %try.handler

invoke.cont:                                      ; preds = %0
  unreachable

try.handler:                                      ; preds = %0
  %exn = landingpad { ptr, i32 }
          cleanup
  ret ptr null
}
tests.source_program:
target datalayout = "E-p:64:64:64-p1:16:16:16-a0:0:8-f32:32:32-f64:64:64-i1:8:8-i8:8:8-i16:16:16-i32:32:32-i64:32:64-v64:64:64-v128:128:128"

declare void @test8a()

define ptr @test8() personality ptr @__gxx_personality_v0 {
  invoke void @test8a()
          to label %invoke.cont unwind label %try.handler

invoke.cont:                                      ; preds = %0
  unreachable

try.handler:                                      ; preds = %0
  %exn = landingpad { ptr, i32 }
          cleanup
  ret ptr null
}
